Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 24
DMG: 11 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

WT: 2.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

# Dec 10 2003 at 12:02 AM Rating: Decent

122 posts
i just got this on brell for less than 1k in trades an plat
▲ Page top
Nice even at later levels
QuoteReply
# Nov 05 2003 at 4:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591749942683
Scholar
74 posts
I got this in a Fear Raid when I was level 47. I'm currently Level 54, and I still use this regularily in my offhand. It procs reliably with my current Stats, providing a nice DOT, and on its own has a fairly decent Damage/Delay ratio. I find it very useful in LDON when there's no Necro along, as the effect combines very nicely with any other DOTs being slammed on the MOB at the same time (as primary tank with an Enchanter along, I usually have Boon of the Garou on me, increasing my Dex to the Max, practically guaranteeing a proc a fight minimum).

Situational at my level, but still genuinely useful.
▲ Page top

zoidber 46 paladin

just got this on fear raid tonite cfant wait to use :)
dropped off of fright, i was surprised that all the warriors did not roll.

▲ Page top
Procs
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2002 at 5:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248385878
View User Forum
46 posts
this wep procs at 46. i buyed one when i was in ec tunnel payed 4k and some trades. i was 45 when i got this sword and 1 blub under 46 so i spend some minutes in SolB and WOOT at 46 this boy starts to procs. Proc is 504 dot in about 21 ticks. and i must say that mobs going now easier and very good for soloing mobs. but i think when i hit 51 or so i will sell this wep and buy other weapon because sometimes is not good to proc on mobs because of mezed mobs or something.


▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 11 2002 at 3:29 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You are a moron not to mention a n00b...
RE: Procs
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2002 at 4:54 AM Rating: Default
Tassoth
574 posts
DDT you i would think you are the moron since there is nothing wrong with being a newb and like your name your ignorance somehow manages to get passed along. some of us happen to have lifes, and do not persecute people for not knowing as much as others.

I openly admit that I don't know everything but when i meet someone who knows less i feel it is my role to help them learn after all this game is meant to be a social game and therefore helping others comes into it. as with brain power i will let you off since i presume you have only just hit your teens and are feeling somewhat anxious about some of the changes your body is experiencing??? all i suggest is that you go and ask your mum if she remembers your daddies name and then look him up and ask him if he can explain these to you.

although im thinking that although great, advances in science have not advanced so far as to allow test-tubes to develop the required elements for speech. nor goats for that matter!!!

in future keep your comments to yourself or learn to be somewhat more understanding and help people. since if you continue your life on its present course you will undoubtedly come to an unfortunate end.

good day to you sir.
____________________________
The Real Iksar

Madho
Novocane
Poldarn

# May 01 2003 at 1:37 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591773162517
10 posts
What the hell are you talking about? What the guy is talking about is right. A DoT is killer taunt but if fighting multiple mobs and you had to taunt off a few and they're DoT'd the means no mezz which is bad if in PoP and other places.

3,705 posts
Notice the "one message skipped by filter settings"

#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 19 2003 at 10:57 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Of course only a monk would reply to a post this idiotic, good day to u fool
My 2cp about Bloodfire
QuoteReply
# Feb 01 2002 at 3:02 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1594570565361
10 posts
I've had one of these for a long time (traded a GMT for it, heh), and have used it extensively. It is pretty nice, but i usually switch it out after it procs (to centi LS for more damage). It DOES NOT have much taunting effect. You'd think it would, but it doesn't. (oh yeah, lots of fun in a duel ;p)

Thinman Strikes
56 Warrior
Torv

Effect
QuoteReply
# Nov 29 2001 at 12:29 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247032656
224 posts
Boil Blood
DoT for 504 Hit Points (HP) in 21 ticks


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: Shd (L53), Nec (L29)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Alteration
Allowable Targets: All

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 200 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: Fire + 25

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Mana Required: 150
Spell Duration: 21 ticks (2.1 minutes)
Duration Formula: 1
Casting Time: 4.0 seconds
Spell Recovery: 2.50 seconds

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: Your blood boils.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso's blood boils.
Spell fades: Your blood cools.

▲ Page top
This sword rocks
QuoteReply
# Feb 13 2001 at 10:43 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This sword is unbelievable, I play a 53 war on Tunare and I love my blood fire. It is 11 damage and 24 del (which translates to 16 del with my CoF) and procs at least 4 times per fight for me. Its proc does 30 damage a tick for exactly 2 minutes, for 504 damage. It has an unique graphic and is war only ) Works nicely, I will probably continue to use it until i complete my epic... then it and blood point hit the bank.
▲ Page top
more than bragginf rights
QuoteReply
# Jan 22 2001 at 12:25 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
this sword used to be the best sword in the game for warriors. before kunark, this sword was the best of the best, and only comes from the god of fear himself. seeing as cazic is not so easy to drop, this sword is proof of ones abilities and experience

galadius, 55 knight
cazic thule
